violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. PIC was provided a copy. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front and back storage doors, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
Fridge door handles located in the retail area was not in good repair. Inspector observed missing and detached door handles. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves and refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
Outside refuse areas and surrounding parking lot was observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, foliage, and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
The ceilings in the retail area and back storage area is in poor repair. Observed water stains. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The refuse area must be maintained clean and free of debris. Litter, excess weeds were observed at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

The walls in the storage area and mop sink area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC has placed a work order for repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on market shelves, bread cardboard freestand floor display, and floor. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC stated last date of pest control was 2 weeks ago. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
Food observed stored on the floor in the market. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the market shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, rodent droppings, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
The dumpster area has an accumulation of vegetation and trash. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
One toilet room is in poor repair, inoperable at time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on market shelves. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
A refrigerator and freezer observed not in good repair, unused at time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the market shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, soil residue, and rodent droppings. The unused empty freezer has an accumulation of frost and ice. The unused refrigerator has an accumulation of soil residue and mold. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
The dumpster enclosure is in poor repair, with the gate broken off. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
Dumpster area has an accumulation of wood pallets. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

The floors throughout the facility especially beneath market shelves, and including the toilet rooms, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
One toilet room is in poor repair, inoperable at time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
The ceiling is in poor repair, water stained in numerous areas. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
Bologna received damaged and scheduled for disposal was observed in the milk refrigerator where customers have access. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

Thermometers are lacking in 2 refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings observed on shelves and food products. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Ecolab Pest Control Service. Last date of service 6/5/2023. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
Food observed stored on the floor in the market. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
The freezer was not in good repair, with condensate dripping and freezing on food. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in several areas of the market have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, rodent droppings, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer including the fans have an accumulation of frost and frozen condensate. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and vegetation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023

The floors throughout the facility including the toilet rooms have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
One toilet room is in poor repair, inoperable at time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
The ceiling is in poor repair, water stained in numerous areas. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

The outside area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, cigarette butts, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
